title: performance — published events
description: Test batteries + benchmarks. Every test result event feeds athlete progress + awards + reporting. BenchmarkBroken events trigger downstream award consideration + coach notification.

events.name: TestBatteryCreated
events.trigger: New TestBattery row (assessment session with multiple tests).

events.name: TestConducted
events.trigger: Test administered to an athlete. Result recorded.

events.name: BenchmarkBroken
events.trigger: P1 event. Athlete beat existing benchmark (personal / team / branch / tenant / national). Cascade to awards.

events.name: TestResultAmended
events.trigger: P1 event. Result corrected. Full audit chain.

events.name: PerformanceProfileUpdated
events.trigger: Athlete's performance profile recomputed (weighted average of recent test results + trend line).
